title: dino monster
description: In this mod, creatures that were not accepted in heaven or hell, find the courage to explore your virtual world full of these creatures
body: this mod you will find four mobs such as indominus rex, neco arc, megalosaurus and spinofaarus. In this mess of meaningless combinations of creatures and some from series and films, I "made" this mod in my time, to see how my creatures would act in this beautiful virtual world (GECKOLIB SUPPORT)
